messages.content: 1.AMENDMENTS TO AGREEMENT翻译
"Amendments to Agreement" 翻译为 "协议修正" 或 "协议修改"。

The Aim 2.3 “In vitro and in vivo validation of candidate genes” in the Research Plan of the Agreement shall be fully deleted.  Furthermore, an additional validation of selected target shall be added to the Research Plan. The amended and restated Research Plan to the Agreement is attached as Annex 1 to this 1st Amendment. 翻译
《协议》研究计划中的目标 2.3 “候选基因的体外和体内验证”应被完全删除。此外，应在研究计划中增加对选定目标的额外验证。修订和重申的协议研究计划作为附件1附加于本第一次修正案。
The budget will be changed as follows:翻译
预算将按以下方式更改：
1.CNY 450,000 CNY (Chinese Yuan, four hundred fifty thousand) for milestone 6 in the Agreement for completion of Aim 2.3 will be canceled. 翻译
1. 协议中完成目标2.3的第六个里程碑的款项人民币450,000元（四十五万）将被取消。

2.Additional payment of CNY 515,000 CNY (Chinese Yuan, five hundred and fifteen thousand) shall be made for the achievement of workpackages of RNF31 target validation as described in the research plan in Annex 1 to the 1st Amendment. It shall become due as follows:翻译
2. 根据第一次修正案附件1中描述的研究计划，为完成RNF31靶点验证工作包，将支付额外款项人民币515,000元（五十一万五千）。支付时间如下：

¥51,500 (Chinese Yuan, fifty-one thousand five hundred) after this 1st Amendment has been signed by THU and BHC, this amount being required in order to initiate the Project including consumable and reagent ordering;翻译
人民币51,500元（五万一千五百元），在清华大学和 BHC 双方签署本第一次修正案后支付，该金额用于启动项目，包括耗材和试剂的订购；
¥9,000 (Chinese Yuan, nine thousand) after milestone 1 has been achieved as described in Annex 1 and the acceptance of interim report by BHC;翻译
人民币9,000元（九千元），在达成附件1中描述的第一里程碑并且BHC接受中期报告后支付；
¥35,000 (Chinese Yuan, thirty-five thousand) after a “Go” decision is made to proceed and upon initiation of WP2 as described in Annex 1;翻译
人民币35,000元（三万五千元），在做出“继续进行”决定并依附件1描述启动WP2之后支付；
¥153,000 (Chinese Yuan, one hundred and fifty-three thousand) after milestone 2 has been achieved as described in Annex 1 and the acceptance of interim report by BHC;翻译
人民币153,000元（十五万三千元），在达成附件1中描述的第二个里程碑并且BHC接受中期报告后支付；
¥50,000 (Chinese Yuan, fifty thousand) after a “Go” decision is made to proceed and upon initiation of WP3 as described in Annex 1;翻译
人民币50,000元（五万元），在做出“继续进行”决定并依附件1描述启动WP3之后支付；
¥140,000 (Chinese Yuan, one hundred and forty thousand) after milestone 3 has been achieved as described in Annex 1 and the acceptance of interim report by BHC;翻译
人民币140,000元（十四万元），在达成附件1中描述的第三个里程碑并且BHC接受中期报告后支付；
¥76,500 (Chinese Yuan, seventy-six thousand five hundred) after the planned workpackages have been completed as described in Annex 1 and the acceptance of Final report by BHC;翻译
人民币76,500元（七万六千五百元），在附件1中描述的计划工作包完成并且BHC接受最终报告后支付；
2.MISCELLANEOUS翻译
2. 其他事项

2.1	Except as expressly modified herein, the Agreement shall remain in full force and effect in accordance with the 5th “Collaboration and Option Agreement”. The present 1st Amendment shall form an integral part thereof.翻译
2.1 除非在此明确修改，否则协议应依照第五版《合作与选择协议》的规定继续完全生效。本第一次修正案应构成协议不可分割的一部分。

2.2In addition to the above conditions for this 1st Amendment, all terms and conditions of the 5th Agreement and Collaboration and Option Agreement shall fully be applicable to this 1st Amendment. Any capitalized terms used herein shall have the meaning as set forth in the 5th Collaboration and Option Agreement unless otherwise defined herein. 翻译
2.2 除了本第一次修正案上述条件外，第五版《合作与选择协议》的所有条款和条件应完全适用于本第一次修正案。除非在此另有定义，否则本文中使用的大写术语应具有第五版《合作与选择协议》中规定的含义。

2.3This 1st Amendment Specific Research Project Agreement shall start from its signature and run for the estimated time as described in Annex 1, and shall run until the completion of the 1st Amendment at no additional cost if this 1st Amendment runs longer than the time planned in Annex 1. This 1st Amendment may be early terminated by BHC at any time. 翻译
2.3 本第一次修正案的特定研究项目协议应从签署之日起生效，并按照附件1中描述的预计时间运行，并在无额外费用的情况下，如果本第一次修正案的实际运行时间超过附件1中计划的时间，应运行至第一次修正案的完成。BHC可在任何时间提前终止本第一次修正案。

2.4This 1st Amendment shall be effective upon the last Party’s signature.

Signature page to follow


IN WITNESS WHEREOF, THU and BHC have executed this 1st  Amendment by their duly authorized representatives.
翻译

2.4 本第一次修正案应在最后一方签字之日起生效。

签字页随后附上

兹证明，清华大学和BHC已通过其正式授权代表执行了本第一次修正案。
Exhibit to the 1st Amendment: 翻译
第一次修正案的附件：
Annex 1: Research Plan 翻译
附件1：研究计划
Systematic Identification of Novel Immunotherapy Targets in Human Genome翻译
系统鉴定人类基因组中的新型免疫治疗靶点
SPECIFIC AIMS翻译
具体目标

REFERENCE
1.Pan D et al., Science. 2018 Feb 16;359(6377):770-775. doi: 10.1126/science.aao1710. Epub 2018 Jan 4.
2.Ferrari de Andrade L et al, Science. 2018 Mar 30;359(6383):1537-1542. doi: 10.1126/science.aao0505.
3.Patel SJ et al., Nature. 2017 Aug 31;548(7669):537-542. doi: 10.1038/nature23477. Epub 2017 Aug 7.
翻译

BUDGET
Budget for Systematic Identification of Novel Immunotherapy Targets in Human Genome: CNY 2,850,000

For the avoidance of doubt, the CNY 2,850,000 is for conduction of above planned research after the cancelation of payment for Aim 2.3 originally planned in the Research Plan of the Agreement, and by the date of the 1st Amendment, CNY 2,450,000 has been duly released. The rest CNY 400, 000 will be released by Bayer after the acceptance of the final report for this part of work by BHC. 

EXTENSION OF THE RESEARCH
From the above-described systematic screening of novel immunotherapy targets in human genome,  certain targets will be selected and subjected to further validation. The additional target validation work will be seen as the extension of the research. For each target selected, the detailed target validation research plan as well as the corresponding budget and timelines are described as below. 翻译

预算
人类基因组新型免疫疗法靶点系统鉴定的预算：人民币2,850,000元

为避免疑义，人民币2,850,000元用于在取消了原协议研究计划中预定的目标2.3的付款后进行上述计划研究，截至第一次修正案之日，已妥善拨付人民币2,450,000元。剩余的人民币400,000元将在BHC接受这部分工作的最终报告后由拜耳公司拨付。

研究的延伸
从上述对人类基因组中新型免疫治疗靶点的系统筛选中，将选定某些靶点并对其进行进一步验证。额外的靶点验证工作将被视为研究的延伸。对于每个选定的靶点，详细的靶点验证研究计划以及相应的预算和时间线如下所述。
RNF31 target validation翻译
RNF31靶点验证
